mapper.sql: id, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, transType, purchaseDate, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, stateCode, ordType, receiveWarehouseId, hopeExportDate, shikomiAnswerNo, operatorId, deptNo, qtyReceive, finishDate, smcCode, invoiceNo, hsCode, greenCode, productType, customerNo, userNo, salesInfoNo, purchaseType, importFobPriceOriginal, importCurrencyId, updateTime, corderNO
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.v_ordering
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.v_ordering (id, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, transType, purchaseDate, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, stateCode, ordType, receiveWarehouseId, hopeExportDate, shikomiAnswerNo, operatorId, deptNo, qtyReceive, finishDate, smcCode, invoiceNo, hsCode, greenCode, productType, customerNo, userNo, salesInfoNo, purchaseType, importFobPriceOriginal, importCurrencyId, updateTime, corderNO) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{purchasedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{statecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{finishdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smccode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=NCHAR}, #{hscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{greencode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{producttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

orderNo,
itemNo,

mapper.update:
update dbo.v_ordering
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
transType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
purchaseDate = #{record.purchasedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=CHAR},
stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receiveWarehouseId = #{record.receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hopeExportDate = #{record.hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE},
shikomiAnswerNo = #{record.shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operatorId = #{record.operatorid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER},
finishDate = #{record.finishdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=CHAR},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=NCHAR},
hsCode = #{record.hscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
greenCode = #{record.greencode,jdbcType=CHAR},
productType = #{record.producttype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
importFobPriceOriginal = #{record.importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
importCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
corderNO = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.v_ordering set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, transType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, purchaseDate = #{record.purchasedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE}, supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=CHAR}, stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receiveWarehouseId = #{record.receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hopeExportDate = #{record.hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE}, shikomiAnswerNo = #{record.shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operatorId = #{record.operatorid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER}, finishDate = #{record.finishdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=CHAR}, invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=NCHAR}, hsCode = #{record.hscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, greenCode = #{record.greencode,jdbcType=CHAR}, productType = #{record.producttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, importFobPriceOriginal = #{record.importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, importCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, corderNO = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
